runbooks.title: Payment Gateway Latency Degradation Runbook
steps: Check payment processor API status at status.stripe.com
Verify database connection pool utilization in Datadog
Check recent deployments in last 2 hours via GitHub Actions
If DB connections > 80%, restart connection pool on payment-db-01
Escalate to payments team lead if not resolved in 10 minutes
